title: hypericum elongatum subsp. callithyrsum
intro: Hypericum elongatum subsp. callithyrsum is a subspecies of the Hypericum elongatum plant, a perennial herb native to the Balkan Peninsula, known for its bright yellow flowers and woody stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hypericum elongatum subsp. callithyrsum include reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, and can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
